transcript.text:
[How is that even possible?!]
[What's the ruckus?]
[Aren't you entertained?]
[Let me see too!]
All by herself?
This ain't right
[Eye-popping]
I've never had anything like it
[What's this?]
[Whole-steamed squid]
[Raw squid]
[Squid pancake]
[Popcorn chicken?]
[Cup noodles too?]
[Seafood and others]
[Seafood]

[Chicken]
[Noodles]
[Clean]
[Starting now]
[A gloomy day in Ulleung Island]
[What has in store for us today?]
[Is Tzuyang here?]
Hello everyone
I wanted to eat outdoors today
But it's windy and rainy
So I found a restaurant here that's pretty unique
So I'll be going there
They serve a variety kinds of food
Very unique
Over here
[Ulleung-gun, Seomyeon] [Woojin's]

Look at this
The squids are enormous
As big as my arm
[Lots of food items on the menu]
Many different kinds of food
This place feels like...
Somewhere I went as a kid
[Reading the items]
That's a lot of stuff
What's available right now?
Steamed squid, raw squid,
[Anything seafood pretty much]
-How about popcorn chicken? -Yes
Then I'll take that with spicy sauce
5 orders of steamed squid
-5? -And...

2 orders of raw squid
Horned turban shell too
5 of them
Squid pancake too, please
Also the cup ramyun noodles
[lol]
Can you finish it all?
That's like 7-8 servings
Then I should order more
[I shouldn't have said that]
[Raw squid sashimi]
[Horned turban shell]
[Whole-steamed squid]
[Squid pancake]
[Popcorn chicken with spicy sauce]
[Tzuyang's Ulleungdo meal]

[I must see this]
[The villagers heard the news]
All by herself?
That's a month's food supply
That's a good size Thank you
[Can't forget the hot water]
All by yourself?
[That's a lie!]
I've been to many restaurants, but
I've never had such a strange food combination before
Let's try the sashimi first How can this be 2 squids?
The squids were huge
It has so much meat
Dip it in sesame oil+salt
It's extremely sweet
No sauce is needed

Amazing
Pancake this time
This looks good too
They use squid inside the seafood pancakes
[Turban shell now!]
This has lots of textures Crunchiness and tenderness
So good
This is whole-steamed
[With gloves]
They usually come sliced, but I asked for it as a whole
The squid sashimi comes with sauce on top
But I wanted to try it without anything
Whole-steamed
Amazing
Let's take a bite as a whole
The guts are not bitter at all

It's sweet
Now for the cup noodles
It's perfectly cooked
Squid and ramyun go well together
A bite of the squid with this
Guts
It's really not bitter
The intestines
Should I put it in the noodles?
Squid guts ramyun
She's eating a lot
It's amazing how much she eats
This ain't right
That's phenomenal
-It comes with kelp -It's seaweed
Is it seaweed?

Natural seaweed
It's precious
Some chicken too
I can taste gochujang (spicy seasoning paste) inside the sauce
I'm not too familiar with it But it's good
It's yummy
Do you sell sodas here?
Cider, coke, Pumpkin punch
-Pumpkin punch? Is that good? -Yes
I'll take 1, please
Wow, thank you
Delicious
I don't really eat foods like pumpkin
It's a well-mixed punch
The sweetness is just about right and it's really tasty
I've never seen such huge squid legs before

Have you seen anything like it?
It's really big
Squid legs are supposed to be really tough to chew But these are really tender
Now with some chojang (spicy-sweet red chili pepper sauce)
Let's finish the noodles first
That's great
Turban shell
Here's the bone
It's tasty
[Slurping the plate]
You're good at eating
That's really 10 servings of food
[1-serving for me]
With some chojang
That's too much
Everyone here is stunned

A skinny lady eating a ridiculous amount of food
Their eyes are popping out
This ain't right
That's phenomenal
[Ulleungdo is shocked]
There are a lot of legs here
But be careful eating these
Can you hear the crunch?
The crunchiness
Almost like an abalone
Thank you
[Chojang out]
[Ssamjang in] (Soybean seasoning paste)
[Refill on the drink too]
The pumpkin punch is great
I was afraid I wasn't going to like it

But it's yummy
When I was coming in Yokji Island,
There were so many pumpkins
I mean Ulleung Island...
Let's try it with ssamjang
It's good!
It's better than expected
Delicious
I like it better than chojang
Tasty
Popcorn chicken
How did they make this old traditional sauce?
It's gotten even more crispy over time
Octopus(?)
I mean squid!
I think "squid" and say "octopus"

I think "Ulleungdo" and say "Yokjido"
Head and brain are disconnected
Wait, I mean head and mouth
Why am I like this?
Take out the mouth
One good thing about Ulleungdo is
The cliffs I will never see cliffs like this elsewhere
The steep hills and cliffs are magnificent
And you can see it everywhere here
Thank you
She warmed this up for me since it got cold
This is raw squid intestines
Looks weird, but it's really savory
It's insane
It's kind of red Interesting
Strong flavors

Bold
Really strong
Let's finish the pancake
The chicken is a bit spicy
It was fine at first, but it's creeping up
Did I eat something wrong?
Last one
Small pieces
It's really spicy
Squid
Last squid piece
Dip it in sesame oil
Last piece of chicken
Squid slurp
Some sesame oil on top
Mix mix mix

[Take no breaks]
Lastly,
The guts
Ramyun soup
[Finished]
-Are you feeling okay? -Yes
My jaw hurts a little
That was a great meal
Thanks everyone~
[We're nearing towards the end of this series]
